title: lathyrus fulvus
intro: Lathyrus fulvus, also known as the brown lathyrus, is a perennial legume native to Europe and western Asia, characterized by its brownish-yellow flowers and distinctive brown pods. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus fulvus include its ability to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as bloating and cramps, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. Lathyrus fulvus is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its extracts have also been used in pharmaceutical applications.
